DFPQ and HRCA gain clear margins from the vanilla Mask2former [8]. Integrating DFPQ on Mask2former boosts performance by 0.5% and 0.6% mIoU on ADE20k val and Cityscapes val, respectively. Employing HRCA on Mask2former leads to 0.4% mIoU gain on both datasets.
